title: Create: Grenzzeichen
description: A Mod that adds a lot of train-related things!
body:
# Welcome to GRENZZEICHEN
## About the Mod
This mod adds a lot of decoration for everything around the rail. It's technically a Create addon, but it doesn´t need create to work. Meaning: You don't need Create and can still use almost everything. All blocks and items can also be obtained in Survival.


## What is included in the mod?

-German signals of various kinds

-Various signs of the Deutsche Bahn

-A complete 5 inch rail system (the only thing that needs Create to work. How it works is shown on one of the pictures)

-Machines to get everything in Survival as well (WIP)

-New material (black iron), including tools and everything that goes with it

-The Signals can also be used on Create-Signals, but only if Create is loaded. If not, they can still be controlled by redstone

-/setspawn to set a location as "Spawn" and /spawn, /hub, /home and /lobby to teleport to Spawn

## NEWEST UPDATE
Added a kompressor and a Compressed Air Scaffolding aka. "Druckluftgerüst" in different variants. (Designer: Strassenbahn_12)

_Grenzzeichen V1.0.3_

## Special Thanks to:

Jannik_ca (for coding)

NotStevy (for coding)

Strassenbahn_12 (for designing)
